display_description.he: בגרויות, פסיכומטרי, קבלה לאוניברסיטאות ומידע על מוסדות לימוד
display_description.en: Navigate the Israeli education system including Bagrut (matriculation) exams, psychometric entrance test (PET), university admissions, and Ministry of Education school data. Use when user asks about Israeli schools, Bagrut requirements, psychometric exam, "psichometri", Israeli university admissions, sekhem calculation, Israeli education levels, Hebrew education terms, or school data from Ministry of Education. Covers K-12 system, exam structure, and higher education admissions. Do NOT use for non-Israeli education systems or post-graduate academic research.
